h6c6ca914g7ce3g4b66g9523g5689c41fe5e0: I used to find this place peaceful. It's just a damned graveyard, now.
hcab48fedg4a91g487ega57dgddbeb808bd04: Still - I'd be digging more graves, if not for you. You've proven yourself a fine warrior, and a better friend.
h161581c4g7412g4f3dg9527g425fa58c72eb: Which is why it pains me to ask you what I'm about to.
h367c81a1gcc50g4eddg83c0g7b34aa36238f: Let me guess - you want something.
h93b36bb7g2848g41a9g8866gb24b1553e25b: We've bought ourselves some time here, and paid for it in blood.
he7656f02gce58g436fg8808g19ab22c513b7: But the goblins are still out there. If we're to proceed to Baldur's Gate, they must be removed.
h0cab0c0egd298g4513ga3a8gd05387894c49: Whatever it is, I'm not interested.
h6e43091agcfd9g403bg8dd7gc578d16b2a2a: I assure you, it very much concerns you as well as us.
hf9003a32g3f45g467dg9de7g980f32f01f47: The goblins are still out there - if we don't do something, we'll never reach Baldur's Gate.
he4260c07g1b89g42ecga4e1g340b18aaae5b: I heard what happened. Thank you for protecting the child.
h3e57b346gcf6fg4de6gbfc5g9a0aa3178682: If the druids are this far gone, then it's not just goblins we have to fear.
hfab9da91gc7f0g4cfega0a2g7f0f778e1335: So it's stay here and risk a massacre, or face one for certain on the road. Quite the choice, isn't it?
hc23bfd6eg22e6g4713gbcb2g69f4d99d2464: I've... already heard. Arabella. Nine summers old, and now she'll never see another.
h4d2d4e48g04e0g4d66gb100g0b2317380c2b: Because of druid 'law'. Every natural law demands I take up my sword, storm their lair and-
h04621ee9gc061g4a68g9211g113b44271fc5: ... but no. That's what Kagha wants. To prove we are exactly what she says - a threat.
h9d7433a7g8186g48a2ga60agfc87d18e7a08: I won't give her the satisfaction. I'll get my people clear of this - but on our terms.
h887a03efg8793g426eg86a1g7a7f272d538c: Tell me... are the things they say about you true?
hf89b9d00g4eb8g4d85ga12bge9c47fa50a9a: That depends: what have you heard?
hcd5b774eg7f93g4403gb990g7f40764483f8: That there is no beast - no foe - you cannot best. Goblins, especially.
hfbc7b485g4008g4961gbd93g30468db4b938: You saw them at the gate. They'll be on the road, too.
h78c855d2gafbag4bbdgbe27g7576061557aa: We'll never make it to Baldur's Gate unless they're dealt with.
h75bba6c0geb50g4d5cg8fd1g6d1adbe917a0: We can't take on an army of them - we need your help.
h6a9002fbgab5ag4d0fg848ag81de13bf8e99: *You know goblins - ferocious, but fragile. Take out their leader and they fold.*
ha04ea7f8g2598g435bg9332g7cd6f02fb138: We don't need to kill an army - just whoever's leading it.
hc9f3e3e4gaf1ag4e99gb0c6g65f5a1260740: Dangerous, but cunning - this is exactly why I've come to you for help.
hfba764a8ge747g4c6dga785gad04f44584b7: I'm grateful. Truly. It's good to know the stories about you are true.
h10c58fc7g8ad4g427dgaae8g9202a049e60c: We'll be ready to leave as soon as you give word.
h7c08730egd197g4a16g89aag5a88081bee38: Please. It's said the Blade of Frontiers never turns his back on those in need.
h8cdebb54g5d4fg4730g95cdg614417c49f4c: All right. I'll see what I can do.
hfb921da0g1c4dg4685g88fag7bc5006b87ba: You'll have to find someone else.
h0944a0e0ge5c9g4f80g81b3g37f6fb1f3741: Please reconsider. Without you, we could perish on the road.
h71b4f3d6gf414g48a3gb545g0edf633371d1: You're the Blade of Frontiers - I know you'll do the right thing.
h653f9d06g7077g4adeg9f50ge995ebf1433c: I don't usually work for free.
h32be8464ge2fbg46f2g80d9gfd467b484fb4: We don't have much. But whatever we have is yours, if you ask it.
h3b4f6ceaga071g4fbdg8729gfeaff99c67a3: Then you can count on me - once I can count the coin.
h11dd9c64gaa94g4935g9010g336aeaed5c9c: Of course. Everything we have. If half the stories about the Blade are true, you're worth it.
h6120087fgb162g4474gafdegde012eaeea76: Don't worry. Killing goblins is its own reward.
hb0eb5a3eg50cag4503g8ad0gb5a781d75d7c: I don't have time - I'm looking for a healer.
h77e3a5a4gf35fg46abgb333g583faa3ed7b8: Try Nettie. If she can't help you, you'll need to go to Baldur's Gate - and you'll face the same threats as us along the way.
h714ec9c1ge9eeg4a5fga5f1g7041ad8ad432: Kill the goblins, and you'll clear the way for yourself as well.
h484b6c9dgf508g437ag9103gd4a154bd09c4: I need to go that way anyway. I said I'd find Halsin.
h2bfe3b4eg8e00g42d4gb232gb1d02803278b: It seems you've earned every bit of your reputation.
h9dee8293gdc78g4b39g89adg19e53b342555: I hunt monsters, if that's what you're saying.
h9dc8d923g882fg4d6agb23egeb6e1f7eb070: Then you might be able to save us all. We'll never get to Baldur's Gate with goblins still out there.
h08795f97g14afg4837g92cagfee357b3d721: Skip to telling me what you want.
h4f995087g803cg4f8bgb1a0ge0c1caf4764c: I don't want - what do you - well.. fine.
hdcebcd3ag7334g41efg9adcg3a530f275169: I've no right to ask, but... we'll never get to Baldur's Gate with goblins still out there.
